supersedes: unlocked Smart Production Workflow Stack v1 proposal
files_created: tests/fixtures/* (9 fixtures: 8 negative, ambient mix of text+registry, 2 clean)
hidden_gems_added_in_v2: 10.1 Registry collision risk - workflow_id now globally unique + single_owner_lock field
10.2 Safe-fixer receipt gap - safe_fix_allowed=true now hard-requires receipt_required=true at validation time
10.3 No aggregate rate limit - added Class 7 circuit breaker + copilot_daily_task_cap/cost_cap/PR_cap budgets
10.4 GitHub Actions isn't free either - added github_actions_daily_minutes_cap
10.5 Self-protection gap - stated who may edit the cost policy itself (same gates as any governance change)
10.6 Audit staleness - last_audited field + 30-day flag, since Copilot UI settings can't be read by script
self_scan_result: FAIL (by design) - seed registry correctly flags all 23 entries as last_audited=TODO. This is the checker doing its job: it will not let a freshly-scaffolded registry silently claim to be audited. Real audit dates must be filled in via the live Copilot/Actions UI per canon section 10.6 before this goes green.
known_limitation: Model/effort/trigger settings for Copilot automations live in a UI the checker cannot read directly. The registry's last_audited field exists specifically to make that gap visible, not to close it - a human still has to check the Copilot Automations UI on a cadence.
